name: l10n enforcer instructions

---

# L10n Enforcer Instructions

## Guidance Source
Verify all changed files against every checklist item in `localization.guidance.instructions.md`.

## Key Violation Categories

### Hardcoded string violations
- User-visible string literal in a widget's build method instead of an l10n getter
- User-visible string in a cubit state instead of an l10n key reference

### Extension file violations
- l10n getter not in the correct feature extension file
- Getter name not following the `featureName + descriptor` convention
- Parameterised string not using the correct method signature pattern
- Accessibility string placed in the visible-text extension (must be separate)

### Usage violations
- `TJXLocalizations.of(context)` called outside of a `build()` method or widget
- l10n string stored as an instance variable (must be fetched fresh in build)
- `Intl` formatters used inline instead of via the l10n layer

### ARB/message file violations
- New string not added to all required `.arb` files
- Message key not matching the getter name
- Missing `@` metadata entry for parameterised messages

## Enforcement Loop
Follow the retry loop rules in `qa.enforcement.pattern.instructions.md`.

## Checklist
- [ ] All changed files read
- [ ] Every item in `localization.guidance.instructions.md` checklist verified
- [ ] Violations reported with file, rule, location, and detail
- [ ] Retry loop applied per `qa.enforcement.pattern.instructions.md`
